HGB_low_CREATININE_high.label: Anemia of Chronic Kidney Disease
HGB_low_CREATININE_high.note: Low HGB + elevated creatinine — classic CKD-anaemia. Both risks compound.

WBC_high_PLT_low.label: Possible haematological malignancy or DIC
WBC_high_PLT_low.note: Leukocytosis with thrombocytopenia — differential includes leukaemia and DIC.

HGB_low_PLT_low.label: Possible bone-marrow disorder, ITP or DIC
HGB_low_PLT_low.note: Pancytopenia pattern — requires urgent haematology workup.

WBC_high_ALT_high.label: Systemic infection or acute hepatitis
WBC_high_ALT_high.note: Leukocytosis + hepatocellular injury — consider viral hepatitis, sepsis.

CREATININE_high_UREA_high.label: Advanced renal impairment
CREATININE_high_UREA_high.note: Both markers elevated — consider AKI on CKD. Check GFR and electrolytes.

female.stage: CKD G4+ — severe, prepare for renal replacement

male.stage: CKD G4+ — severe, prepare for renal replacement
